sourceMovie.title: The Thirteenth Floor
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Thirteenth Floor works as a thriller movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The thriller and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Twelve Monkeys
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Thirteenth Floor clicked for you, Twelve Monkeys (1995) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Thirteenth Floor?
faq.answer: Try Twelve Monkeys, Wifelike, Blade Runner—each shares DNA with The Thirteenth Floor while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Thirteenth Floor?
faq.answer: The Thirteenth Floor (1999) is best described as Thriller, Science Fiction, Mystery. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Thirteenth Floor worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
